meaning: of the book (describes what ءَايٰتُ/verses are of)
indeed we (subject of أَنزَلْنٰهُ - we sent it down)
a recitation (object of أَنزَلْنٰهُ - we sent it down)
so that you all (connects to تَعْقِلُونَ - you all understand)
you all use reason (addressing the listeners of the Quran)
upon you/to you (speaking to one male)
the Quran (object of نَقُصُّ - we relate)
When (introducing Yusuf's statement to his father)
Joseph (as the subject who is speaking to his father)
O my father (addressing Yusuf's father in the ayah)
Indeed I (speaking to أَبِيهِ - his father)
and the sun (as object of رَأَيْتُ - I saw)
to/for me (connected to رَأَيْتُ - I saw)
prostrating ones (object of رَأَيْتُ - I saw)
O my son (being addressed by يَعْقُوبُ)
and so they plot (connected to لَا تَقْصُصْ - do not tell)
for you (object of يَكِيدُوا - they plot)
a plot/scheme (as the object being made against يٰبُنَىَّ)
he specially selects/chooses you (object of رَبُّكَ/your Lord)
and he teaches you (object of يَجْتَبِيكَ)
and he completes (fully) (connected to يَجْتَبِيكَ - chooses you)
His blessing (object of يُتِمُّ - he completes)
he completed it (referring to نِعْمَتَهُ - His favor)
upon/on (connected to ءَالِ يَعْقُوبَ - the family of Jacob)
Abraham (object of أَتَمَّهَا - He completed it)
for the ones who ask (with emphasis)
when (referring to a past time, introducing قَالُوا - they said)
surely in (emphasizing that يوسف is in ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ/clear error)
in a state of complete error (object of فِى)
Joseph (as the object being acted upon in اقْتُلُوا يُوسُفَ - kill Joseph)
a land (as the destination of طْرَحُوهُ/throw him)
for you all (receiving the action of يَخْلُ - become clear/empty)
and you all become (after killing/banishing يُوسُفَ)
Yusuf/Joseph (as the object of تَقْتُلُوا - do not kill)
of the hidden place/depth (in the well)
of/in the deep well/pit (where they planned to put يُوسُفَ)
may pick him up (object of بَعْضُ)
some (of the travelers who will find يُوسُفَ)
O our father! (subject of قَالُوا/they said)
you definitely trust us (negated by لا)
Yusuf/Joseph (as the object of تَأْمَنَّا - you trust)
and indeed we (are sincere advisers to يُوسُفَ)
send him! (command to send Yusuf, mentioned earlier)
with us (the brothers speaking to يَعْقُوب)
tomorrow (as the time when they will send him)
he grazes/roams freely (connected to وَيَلْعَبْ - and plays)
and let him play (connected to يَرْتَعْ - let him graze)
indeed I (subject of يَحْزُنُنِى - grieves me)
surely he will make me sad (with emphasis)
and I fear (connected to لَيَحْزُنُنِىٓ - it grieves me)
he eats/will eat him/it (object of أَخَافُ/I fear)
the wolf (subject of يَأْكُلَهُ/will eat him)
and you all (while being unaware of يَأْكُلَهُ)
away from him (referring to the wolf in يَأْكُلَهُ)
those who are neglectful/unaware (in subject position)
surely if (introducing what Jacob's sons said about the wolf)
he ate him (the wolf ate يوسف)
the wolf (subject of أَكَلَهُ - ate him)
then/in that case (responding to their statement about the wolf)
the well (that they put يُوسُف in)
to him (connected to وَأَوْحَيْنَآ - and We inspired)
I swear you will definitely inform them (about this matter)
with/about their matter (referring to يَشْعُرُونَ - they perceive)
they sense/are sensing (subject of لا in لا يَشْعُرُونَ)
at night (describing when they came to their father)
they weep/cry (referring to Joseph's brothers in this ayah)
O our father (said by Yusuf's brothers to their father)
Joseph (as the object of تَرَكْنَا - we left)
and so he ate him (referring to يُوسُفَ)
the wolf (subject of أَكَلَهُ - ate him)
and not (you are not a believer in us)
you (masculine singular, being addressed by يُوسُفَ's brothers)
believing (in us) (connected to أَنتَ - you are)
to/for us (emphasizing what was said to يٰٓأَبَانَا)
and even if (connecting to their previous statement)
truthful ones (plural, being acted upon by كُنَّا)
with a false statement (in this ayah, describing what they brought with the shirt)
rather (contradicting what Jacob's sons claimed about the wolf)
she really made something seem attractive (subject of your souls/selves)
for you all (the ones whose souls made something attractive to them)
a matter (object of سَوَّلَتْ - made fair-seeming)
so [what is required is] patience (in response to يَقُولُ he says)
The One who is asked for help (referring to Allah in this context)
a piece of merchandise (object of وَأَسَرُّوهُ - and they kept it secret)
And Allah (as the subject of عَلِيمٌۢ/knowing)
they work/act/do (referring to a group in the ayah)
and they sold him (connecting to the previous events in the story of يوسف)
silver coins (as the object being counted in بَخْسٍ معدودة - few/countable)
and they were (connected to فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلزَّاهِدِينَ)
in it (referring to selling him for a low price)
the people who don't care about (something) (after مِنَ)
the one who (subject of اشْتَرَىٰهُ/bought him)
from (connects مِّصْرَ 'Egypt' to the previous phrase)
his dwelling place (object of أَكْرِمِى/make honorable)
and like that (connects to مَكَّنَّا - we established)
we firmly established (connected to لِيُوسُفَ - for Yusuf)
and so that we teach him
And Allah (as the subject of غَالِبٌ)
and yet/but still (contrasts with previous statement in أَكْرِمِى مَثْوَىٰهُ)
they know/understand (referring to most people in لٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)
and knowledge (object of ءَاتَيْنٰهُ - We gave)
and likewise (we reward نَجْزِى the good-doers)
and she tried to persuade/entice him
the one who/which (feminine) (refers to امْرَأَت العَزِيز - the wife of the minister)
he (subject of رَاوَدَ - tried to seduce)
in (location where she was with him)
the doors (object of وَغَلَّقَتِ - and she closed)
he made good/treated well (referring to اللَّهِ - Allah)
my dwelling place (referring to Yusuf's place in the house of Al-Aziz)
she intended strongly (connected to بِهِۦ - towards him)
and he intended strongly (subject of لَوْلَآ - 'if not for')
with/toward her (referring to the situation with يوسف)
if not for (introduces what would have happened to هَمَّ)
that (introduces what happened when he saw)
clear proof/evidence (object of رَّءَا - he saw)
like that/thus (pointing to what happened in the previous ayah)
so that we may turn away (from يوسف the evil and immorality)
the harm/evil (object of لِنَصْرِفَ - that we may turn away)
from (connecting عِبَادِنَا to what came before)
our servants (of مِنْ our chosen ones)
the purified ones (referring to Allah's chosen servants)
and they both competed in racing (to ٱلْبَابَ)
the door (object that they raced to)
and she tore forcefully (قَمِيصَهُۥ - his shirt)
her master (object of أَلْفَيَا - they both found)
the reward/punishment (as the subject of a sentence)
who/whoever (referring to the person who intended evil against يُوسُف's family)
evil (as the object of أَرَادَ - intended)
she tried to seduce me (subject of قَالَ - he said)
and he witnessed (connected to قَالَ - he said)
it was torn (violently) (the shirt of يُوسُفَ)
and if (connects this condition to previous statement)
it was torn (referring to قَمِيصُهُۥ his shirt)
back side, rear part (of قَمِيصُهُ his shirt)
so she lied (as a consequence of seeing his shirt torn from behind)
and he (the one who is مِنَ ٱلصَّادِقِينَ - among the truthful ones)
then when (connects to رَءَا - he saw)
it was torn (describing قَمِيصَهُۥ - his shirt)
from (showing قَمِيصَهُۥ was torn from this direction)
indeed it (referring to this situation being part of their plot)
your (women's) secret plan (referring to the women's plot against Yusuf)
your (feminine plural) secret plan (possessed by you women)
Joseph (the subject of أَعْرِضْ - turn away)
and seek forgiveness! (command to a female)
you were (feminine, addressing Eve in this ayah)
of the mighty one (title of امْرَأَتُ's husband)
her young man/servant (object of تُرٰوِدُ - she seeks)
indeed/certainly (emphasizing شَغَفَهَا - 'she has become passionately in love')
he overwhelmed her with passionate love
intense love (object of شَغَفَهَا - it has possessed her)
indeed we (connected to لَنَرَىٰهَا - we see her)
then when (connects to رَأَيْنَهُۥٓ - they saw him)
she heard (subject of أَرْسَلَتْ - she sent)
with their plot (referring to when she heard about the women's scheme)
a reclining place (as the object being prepared)
then when (connects to سَمِعَتْ - she heard)
not (negating هٰذَا بَشَرًا - this is a human)
this (masculine) (referring to يوسف who they're amazed by)
a human being (object of رَأَيْنَهُ - they saw him)
this (masculine, near, strongly emphasized) (subject of بَشَرًا)
she said (introducing her direct speech that follows)
in him/it (referring to the situation mentioned in لُمْتُنَّنِى)
she definitely tried repeatedly to persuade him
and he sought protection (from يوسف resisting زليخا's advances)
he does/will do (in conditional phrase with لَّمْ)
what (object of ءَامُرُهُۥ - I command him)
he will most certainly be imprisoned
and he will surely be (with emphasis)
the prison (subject of أَحَبُّ - more beloved)
to me (in relation to يَدْعُونَنِى - they invite me)
from what (that يَدْعُونَنِىٓ they invite me to)
and if not (condition for تَصْرِفْ - you avert)
their (feminine) plotting/scheming (referring to the women's plot against Yusuf)
I [will] incline towards (in response to يَدْعُونَنِي - they invite me)
and I be (connected to أَصْبُ - I incline)
the ignorant ones (object of مِنَ - from/of)
and so he responded (to him) (connected to رَبُّهُۥ)
to/for him (referring to يوسف who is being helped by رَبُّهُۥ)
and so He turned away (subject of فَٱسْتَجَابَ)
The All-Knowing (as a divine attribute, describing هُوَ)
then (connects this ayah to what came before it)
for them/to them (connected to بَدَا - it appeared)
after (connected to مَا which follows it)
they saw (subject of لَيَسْجُنُنَّهُۥ - they will surely imprison him)
the signs, the miracles (object of رَأَوُا - they saw)
until, up to (لَيَسْجُنُنَّهُۥ - they would imprison him)
two young men (who entered prison with يوسف)
I press/squeeze (in the dream of أَحَدُهُمَآ)
the other (subject of قَالَ - he said)
my head (being acted upon by فَوْقَ)
bread (object being carried in the dream)
the ones who do good (acted on)
not (negates يَأْتِيكُمَا - will come to you two)
he comes/arrives to both of you
you two are provided with it (subject of طَعَامٌ)
except (what I will tell you about before it comes to you)
with its interpretation (connected to نَبَّأْتُكُمَا - I informed you both)
before (connected to أَن يَأْتِيَكُمَا - 'that it comes to you two')
it comes to you both (referring to food in طَعَامٌ)
my Lord (the one who taught me)
the religion/way (that I have left behind)
a people (who do not believe in اللَّهِ)
in the Hereafter (connected to يُؤْمِنُونَ - they believe)
the way/religion (as object of اتَّبَعْتُ - I followed)
and Isaac (connected to إِبْرٰهِيمَ in list)
and Jacob (completing list with إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحٰقَ)
for us (connected to كَانَ - it was)
that (introduces what was not possible: نُّشْرِكَ)
that we join as partner (with بِٱللَّهِ - with Allah)
with/by Allah (object of نُّشْرِكَ - we associate)
that (referring to what was mentioned before in the ayah)
from/of (connects شَىْءٍ to what comes before it)
of the people (after على/upon in this ayah)
of the people (after على/upon in this ayah)
they are grateful/thank (referring to most people in أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)
of the prison (possessed by صاحبي - my two companions)
The One (as a name/title of Allah)
The All-Overpowering One (attribute of اللَّهُ, subject)
names (as objects that you made up)
Allah (as the subject of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
with it/her (referring to the names/أَسْمَآءً mentioned before)
any authority/proof (in relation to ما أنزل الله - what Allah has sent down)
except (what comes after إِلَّا is excluded from what was mentioned before)
him specifically (as the object of تَعْبُدُوٓا۟ - you worship)
the perfectly upright/correct one (describing الدين/the religion)
and yet/but still (connects while contrasting with previous statement)
of the people (emphasized, possessed by أَكْثَرَ)
they know (referring to most people/أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)
of the prison (possessed by صاحبي - two companions)
one of you two (subject of فَيَسْقِى)
and then he will pour drink (for رَبَّهُۥ - his master)
and as for (connects to فَيُصْلَبُ - he will be crucified)
and then she eats food (subject of الطَّيْرُ - the birds)
the birds (subject of فَتَأْكُلُ - and then it/they will eat)
it was decided (about the matter you both asked about)
the matter/affair (subject of قُضِىَ - was decreed)
in it (referring to الْأَمْرُ - the matter)
and he said (connected to previous statement)
to the one who (connected to قَالَ - he said)
that he (subject of ناجٍ - being saved)
one who is saved (in a chain of possession)
from both of them (referring to the two prisoners)
your master who nurtures (referring to the person being spoken to)
and so he made him forget (done by الشيطان)
the extremely rebellious one (subject of فَأَنسَىٰهُ)
in the prison (connected to فَلَبِثَ فِى)
and he said (subject: ٱلْمَلِكُ - the king)
I see (said by the king about his dream)
he eats them (f) (referring to the seven fat cows)
green ones (describing سُنۢبُلٰتٍ - ears of corn)
and others (describing the dry ears of corn)
O chiefs/noble assembly! (being addressed about رُءْيَا/vision)
give me your opinion (plural command to the chiefs/nobles)
my vision (object of أَفْتُونِى/give me interpretation)
for/regarding the vision/dream (connected to تَعْبُرُونَ - you interpret)
you all interpret (addressing the king's advisors)
of dreams (part of أَضْغٰثُ أَحْلٰمٍ - confused dreams)
and not (they say they cannot interpret the dreams)
with/by those who know deeply (object of نَحْنُ)
and he said (introducing what the saved prisoner remembered)
from both of them (referring to the two prisoners mentioned earlier in the story)
I (subject of أُنَبِّئُكُم - I will inform you)
I will inform you all (about تَأْوِيلِ)
so all of you send me! (plural command)
Joseph (as the subject of أَفْتِنَا - give us explanation)
the very truthful one (title of يُوسُفُ)
cows (feminine plural, being described by سِمَانٍ)
plump ones (describing the seven cows in the dream)
he eats them (referring to the seven fat cows)
skinny ones (as the subject doing the eating)
green ones (describing سُنۢبُلٰتٍ - ears of corn)
and others (connecting to the previous description of ears of corn)
dry ones (feminine plural, describing the ears of corn being referred to)
surely perhaps I (expressing strong hope that I will return)
of the people (after the word إِلَى meaning 'to')
perhaps they (expressing hope they will know يَعْلَمُونَ)
they know (referring to the people in لَعَلَّهُمْ)
you (all) plant (referring to the people Yusuf is addressing)
seven (object of تَزْرَعُونَ - you will plant)
continuously/persistently (describes how تَزْرَعُونَ/you will plant is done)
and what (referring to حَصَدتُّمْ - you harvested)
so leave it! (command to many people)
its grain spike (referring to what was harvested)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
a little (describes how much is eaten in تَأْكُلُونَ)
from what (of what تَأْكُلُونَ you eat)
they (feminine) eat (referring to the seven hard years that will eat/consume what was stored)
you all sent ahead (in the past)
for them (feminine) (object of يَأْكُلْنَ - they consume)
except (what comes after it is excluded from يَأْكُلْنَ - they consume)
a little (of what you stored) (object of يَأْكُلْنَ)
you all (masculine) store/protect (referring to storing grain in this ayah)
that (pointing to something far in the past or future)
they press/squeeze (referring to people pressing grapes and olives for juice/oil)
the king (subject of قَالَ - he said)
and when (connects to جَآءَهُ - came to him)
he came to him (messenger came to king)
your master who takes complete care (connected to إِلَىٰ)
so ask him! (about the women) (command after ارْجِعْ)
state/condition (subject of what is being asked about)
of the women (object of فَسْـَٔلْهُ/ask him about)
who, those (feminine plural referring to the women who cut their hands)
their hands/powers (referring to the women who cut their hands)
I tried to persuade you (feminine plural)
Joseph (as the object of رٰوَدتُّنَّ - you all tempted)
they (feminine) said (responding to the king's question)
we knew (subject of قُلْنَ - they [women] said)
any harmful thing (in response to being asked about يُوسُفَ)
of the mighty one (referring to the minister's wife speaking)
now (in response to امْرَأَتُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ's confession)
the truth (subject of حَصْحَصَ - became clear/manifest)
I tried repeatedly to persuade him
surely/truly from/among (connected to next word الصَّادِقِينَ)
so that he may know (purpose of يُوسُفُ sent the message)
I act unfaithfully to him (negated by لَمْ)
in/with the unseen (related to أَخُنْهُ - I did not betray him)
Allah (as the object of يَعْلَمَ - that he may know)
I declare innocent (subject of the verb)
my Lord (subject of رَحِمَ - had mercy)
the king (subject of قَالَ - he said)
come to me! (command to many people)
I seek to select him specially for myself (addressing the king about يوسف)
and when (connects to كَلَّمَهُ - he spoke to him)
he said (subject of the sentence, speaking to يوسف)
of high rank (describing Yusuf's position with the king)
of the earth/land (possessed by/connected to خَزَآئِنِ - storehouses)
Indeed I (speaking to خَزَآئِنِ الْأَرْضِ - treasuries of the land)
and like that (connecting to what happened to Yusuf)
We firmly established (subject of نُصِيبُ - we bestow)
for/to Joseph (object of مَكَّنَّا - we established)
he settles himself firmly (in الْأَرْضِ - the land)
from it (feminine, referring to الْأَرْضِ/the land)
where/wherever (location word used with يَتَبَوَّأُ - he settles)
with our mercy (object of نُصِيبُ - we bestow)
and not (connects to previous statement about showing mercy)
we waste (in the context of أَجْرَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ - the reward of the doers of good)
the good-doers (whose reward is not lost)
and they were (connected to يَتَّقُونَ - they used to fear Allah)
they protect themselves (referring to those who believed in the previous ayah)
Joseph (object of فَدَخَلُوا - they entered upon)
so they entered (after إِخْوَةُ يُوسُفَ came)
and so he recognized them (while they didn't recognize him)
they who do not recognize (referring to Yusuf's brothers)
with their provisions/supplies (related to جَهَّزَهُم - he equipped them)
with a brother (connected to ٱئْتُونِى - bring me)
for you all (addressing the brothers of يوسف)
look! behold! (introducing what Yusuf says next)
the measurement (object of أُوفِى - I give in full)
then if (connects this condition to what was said before)
with/by it/him (referring to proof they need to bring)
then not (connects to تَأْتُونِى - you bring me)
measuring, weighing (as the object of فَلَا 'then no')
for you all (shows something belongs to or is for your group)
and not (connects to فَلَا كَيْلَ لَكُمْ عِندِى - 'then there will be no measure for you from me')
they said (subject of سَنُرٰوِدُ - we will try to persuade)
we will keep trying to convince (about أَبَاهُ - his father)
away from him, about him (referring to their father mentioned in أَبَاهُ)
and indeed we (will do what was mentioned before)
perhaps they (expressing hope they will recognize it)
they recognize it (referring to their merchandise)
perhaps they (expressing hope they will recognize it)
Then when (connecting to رَجَعُوٓا۟ - they returned)
O our father (speaking to their father in the story of Yusuf)
it was prevented (the weighing/measuring was prevented from us)
the measuring out (of goods) (subject of مُنِعَ - was prevented)
so send! (command in response to previous statement)
we will measure out (requesting permission from أَبِيهِمْ)
for him (referring to their brother who they will protect)
I should trust you all (in response to هَلْ/should I?)
upon him (referring back to the brother mentioned in أَخِيهِ)
I trusted you all (referring to the brothers of يوسف)
as a protector (describing how Allah is better)
their goods/provisions (object of وَجَدُوا - they found)
we seek (something we want from يٰٓأَبَانَا - O our father)
our merchandise (that was returned to us)
it was returned (referring to بِضٰعَتَهُمْ - their merchandise)
to us (object of رُدَّتْ - was returned)
and we provide food (to our family)
will not (negates أُرْسِلَهُ - I will send him)
a solemn pledge (that they gave to يَعْقُوب)
you will most certainly bring to me
except (connects to أَن يُحَاطَ - that you are surrounded)
